editor_search = Search...
editor_tutorial = Tutorial (sort of)\n\nNormal tutorial may be added later at an unspecified point in time.\nTo view information about a part, hold it in the part selection menu (most of the information you need can be found there).\nTop bar buttons (from left to right): in the menu, editor settings, help, action groups, connection groups, decorations.\n\nAction Groups: Switch multiple parts at the same time when the corresponding action group is activated.\nConnection groups: Parts only connect to each other when they are in the same group. Each part can be assigned multiple CGs.\nDecorations: Exclusively decorative details displayed over the entire ship.

partname_NeutGun = Neutron blaster
partname_SniperLaser = Heavy laser
partname_SniperLaser2 = Heavy laser

partname_LaserEmitter = Beam emitter

partname_AngVelocitySensor = Angular velocity sensor
partname_AngleSensor = Angle sensor
partname_CoordSensor = Position sensor
partname_AltitudeSensor = Altitude sensor

partname_HPSensor = Health sensor

partname_Screen = Screen

partname_AndGate = AND-gate

partname_CheatEngine = Cheat engine
partname_CheatGyro = Cheat gyroscope
partname_CheatGPMP = Cheat gravity generator
partname_CheatDecelerator = Cheat decelerator
partname_ImmobilityBlock = Immobility block
partname_CheatBallast = Cheat ballast
partname_IndestructibilityBlock = Indestructibility block
partname_CheatShield = Cheat force shield
partname_CheatBomb = Cheat bomb
partname_CheatStructure = Cheat structure
partname_CheatArmor = Indestructible armor
partname_CheatWedge0 = 1*1 indestructible wedge
partname_CheatWedge1 = 1*2 indestructible wedge
partname_CheatWedge2 = 1*3 indestructible wedge
partname_CheatWedge3 = 1*4 indestructible wedge
partname_CheatWedge4 = 1*5 indestructible wedge

partdesc_MainBlock = Main module, crutial for ship control. Features a built-in gyroscope, camera and a small battery.
partdesc_ProbeCore = Main module, crutial for ship control. Features a built-in gyroscope, camera and a small battery.
partdesc_Camera = Allows to focus on a certain area of a big ship.
partdesc_Scope = Allows you to offset the camera by a variable distance. If there are multiple active scopes on the ship, their effects are summed up.
partdesc_Gyro = Creates a torque to rotate the ship.
partdesc_Beacon = Creates a map point.
partdesc_FueltankSmall = Contains hydrogen for engines operation.
partdesc_FueltankMed = Contains hydrogen for engines operation.
partdesc_FueltankBig = Contains hydrogen for engines operation.
partdesc_FueltankBigger = Contains hydrogen for engines operation.
partdesc_FueltankHuge = Contains hydrogen for engines operation.
partdesc_BatterySmall = Stores electrical power for the operation of various systems.
partdesc_BatteryMed = Stores electrical power for the operation of various systems.
partdesc_BatteryBig = Stores electrical power for the operation of various systems.
partdesc_BatteryBigger = Stores electrical power for the operation of various systems.
partdesc_BatteryHuge = Stores electrical power for the operation of various systems.
partdesc_ExottankSmall = Contains exotic matter.
partdesc_ExottankMed = Contains exotic matter.
partdesc_ExottankBig = Contains exotic matter.
partdesc_ExottankBigger = Contains exotic matter.
partdesc_ExottankHuge = Contains exotic matter.
partdesc_DeuttankSmall = Contains deuterium.
partdesc_DeuttankMed = Contains deuterium.
partdesc_DeuttankBig = Contains deuterium.
partdesc_DeuttankBigger = Contains deuterium.
partdesc_DeuttankHuge = Contains deuterium.
partdesc_Pipe = 
partdesc_BackgroundPipe = 
partdesc_PhotonReactor = A light basic reactor.
partdesc_Hydrogenerator = Generates energy by burning hydrogen. Not the most efficient way to use it.
partdesc_ExotReactor = More powerful and compact as compared to the nuclear one but also fragile and explosion-prone.
partdesc_SolarBlock = Solar panel in block format. Generates minimal amount of power.
partdesc_Solarpanel = Less power generation but also extremely light-weight versus other reactors.
partdesc_SolarpanelMed = Generates more power but takes up more space than a small panel.
partdesc_SolarpanelBig = Generates much more energy, but has a colossal size.
partdesc_IsozReactor = Generates energy, non-explosive.
partdesc_DeutReactor = Efficient reactor with a built-in supply of deuterium.
partdesc_NuclearReactor = Generates a moderate amount of energy. Explosive.
partdesc_FusionReactor = Generates a lot of energy, consumes hydrogen. Very explosive.
partdesc_WarpReactor = Generates a lot of energy, consumes exotic matter. Very explosive.
partdesc_FuelEngine = Basic engine. Requires hydrogen to operate. Has a low-efficiency built-in generator.
partdesc_FuelEngine2 = More thrust in exchange for increased hydrogen consumption and greater weight. Has a low-efficiency built-in generator.
partdesc_FuelEngine3 = Engine with huge thrust and huge hydrogen consumption. Designed for operations near the surface of planets. Has a low-efficiency built-in generator.
partdesc_SolidfuelBooster = Powerful engine with its own fuel reserve. Cannot be turned off.
partdesc_PhotEngine = Light and weak engine powered by electricity.
partdesc_IonEngine = Electrical engine of medium power.
partdesc_NeutEngine = The most powerful of the electric engines, yet with comparatively low thrust.
partdesc_ExotEngine = Powerful engine with a high consumption of exotic matter.
partdesc_PlasmaEngine = High thrust engine; consumes both electricity and hydrogen.
partdesc_NuclearEngine = Highly efficient low-thrust engine. Generates power more efficiently.
partdesc_DeutEngine = Very efficient medium thrust engine with built-in deuterium tank.
partdesc_DeutEngineBig = Larger version of the deuterium engine.
partdesc_FusionEngine = Very high thrust engine; consumes both electricity and hydrogen.
partdesc_WarpEngine = An engine with huge thrust, consuming exotic matter and a lot of electricity.
partdesc_TitanArmor = Standard armor, more frequently used as a structural module.
partdesc_TitanArmorBig = Heavy armor, good protection in combination with regeneration.
partdesc_InsulatorArmor = Lightweight, but not very durable armor. Protects against lasers.
partdesc_InsulatorWedge0 = Insulator armor wedge
partdesc_InsulatorWedge1 = Insulator armor wedge
partdesc_InsulatorWedge2 = Insulator armor wedge
partdesc_InsulatorWedge3 = Insulator armor wedge
partdesc_InsulatorWedge4 = Insulator armor wedge
partdesc_QuartzArmor = Very durable but heavy armor.
partdesc_QuartzWedge0 = Quartz armor wedge
partdesc_QuartzWedge1 = Quartz armor wedge
partdesc_QuartzWedge2 = Quartz armor wedge
partdesc_QuartzWedge3 = Quartz armor wedge
partdesc_QuartzWedge4 = Quartz armor wedge
partdesc_BizrArmor = Light armor, almost completely absorbs lasers, generating energy with each hit. Generates some energy passively.
partdesc_BizrWedge0 = Bizarium armor wedge
partdesc_BizrWedge1 = Bizarium armor wedge
partdesc_BizrWedge2 = Bizarium armor wedge
partdesc_BizrWedge3 = Bizarium armor wedge
partdesc_BizrWedge4 = Bizarium armor wedge
partdesc_RegenArmor = Consumes energy, recovers slowly and repairs adjacent parts.
partdesc_ForceArmor = Consumes energy, destroys part of non-laser fire (projectiles).
partdesc_ForceShieldBasic = Protects a small area from projectiles while consuming a lot of energy. Does not protect against lasers, missiles and railguns.
partdesc_ForceShieldSlow = Protects a small area from projectiles while consuming some energy. Stronger and more effective than a basic shield, but regenerates very slowly. Does not protect against lasers, missiles and railguns.
partdesc_ForceShieldBig = Protects a very large area from projectiles, consuming a lot of energy and exotic matter. Does not protect against lasers, missiles and railguns.
partdesc_Decoupler = Allows you to split the ship into several parts.
partdesc_PipeDecoupler = Allows you to split the ship into several parts. Has a built-in pipe for liquid resources.
partdesc_DockingPort = Required for docking with other ships.
partdesc_RCS = The reactive control system is useful for more precise ship control
partdesc_MobileSpawn = A multiblock that allows you to create new spaceships from the resources on board.
partdesc_DrillSmall = Allows to extract some solid and liquid resources from the very surface of planets and asteroids.
partdesc_DrillMed = Allows to extract solid and liquid resources from under the surface of planets and asteroids.
partdesc_DrillBig = Allows to extract solid and liquid resources from the depths of planets and asteroids.
partdesc_Grinder = Allows you to dismantle parts into the resources they were built from. Does not return liquid resources or container contents.
partdesc_ExcavatorSmall = Effectively collects solid resources from the surface of planets and asteroids.
partdesc_ExcavatorMed = Effectively collects solid resources from the surface of planets and asteroids.
partdesc_ExotCollector = Melts and collects crystals of exotic matter from the surface of planets.
partdesc_CargoBlockSmall = Stores solid resources (only one resource at a time).
partdesc_CargoBlockMed = Stores solid resources (only one resource at a time).
partdesc_CargoBlockBig = Stores solid resources (only one resource at a time).
partdesc_GlowtankSmall = Stores GLOW before further processing. You can mine GLOW on special GLOW planets using Large or Medium Drills.
partdesc_GlowtankBig = Stores GLOW before further processing. You can mine GLOW on special GLOW planets using Large or Medium Drills.
partdesc_GlowtankBigger = Stores GLOW before further processing. You can mine GLOW on special GLOW planets using Large or Medium Drills.
partdesc_ElectrolyzerSmall = Melts ice and processes it into hydrogen, consumes a lot of energy.
partdesc_ElectrolyzerMed = Melts ice and processes it into hydrogen, consumes a lot of energy.
partdesc_ElectrolyzerBig = Melts ice and processes it into hydrogen, consumes a lot of energy.
partdesc_DeutMixerSmall = Mixes GLOW and water to make deuterium.
partdesc_DeutMixerMed = Mixes GLOW and water to make deuterium.
partdesc_DeutMixerBig = Mixes GLOW and water to make deuterium.
partdesc_ExotSmelterMed = Smelts exotic minerals to extract exotic matter.
partdesc_ExotSmelterBig = Smelts exotic minerals to extract exotic matter.
partdesc_SmelterSmall = Basic module for processing ores. Not very efficient, but cheap and compact.
partdesc_SmelterMed = Improved module for processing ores. Can produce platinum and uranium.
partdesc_SmelterBig = Advanced module for processing ores. Consumes deuterium to increase heating efficiency.
partdesc_Hinge = Connects parts of the ship, allowing rotation.
partdesc_Rotor = Motorized hinge.
partdesc_Piston = Allows linear movement of ship parts.
partdesc_Rotor = Motorized hinge. Has a built-in pipe for liquid resources.
partdesc_Piston = Allows linear movement of ship parts. Has a built-in pipe for liquid resources.

partdesc_SmallWedge = 
partdesc_SmallWedge2 = Small triangle console. Can be placed behind engines.

partdesc_BigWedge6 = Big triangle console. Can be placed behind engines.
partdesc_BackgroundBlock = Doesn't collide with other parts.
partdesc_StructBlock = Structural block. Can be placed behind engines.
partdesc_StructBlock2 = Medium structural block. Can be placed behind engines.

partdesc_SmallAntenna = 
partdesc_MedAntenna = 
partdesc_FuelDockingPort = Needed for docking with other ships. Connects pipe and tank systems on different ships. Useful for automatic transportation of liquid resources, but not needed for moving solid resources or manually moving liquids.
partdesc_Pump = Automatically moves the specified resource between two unconnected resource systems.
partdesc_SolidPump = Automatically moves the specified solid resource from the containers located at the back to the connected container.
partdesc_ResourceVoid = Destroys any resources transfered into it.
partdesc_BasicWheel = Small wheel. NOT suitable for moving on the surface of planets.
partdesc_BigWheel = Big wheel. NOT suitable for moving on the surface of planets.
partdesc_GPMP = Uses gravity to attract and repel various objects.
partdesc_Decelerator = Automatically slows down the ship without the use of engines. On larger ships, it is still recommended to use engines instead.
partdesc_DirectionalDecelerator = Reduces ship speed in one axis only. Can be useful to imitate aerodynamics for fighters.
partdesc_Sign = Allows you to display custom text. Supports formatting via HTML tags.
partdesc_TogglableCollider = When activated, it can switch to "background mode", in which it stops colliding with other objects.
partdesc_Anchor = Allows you to attach to the surface of planets and asteroids.
partdesc_BasicLaser = Basic weapon.
partdesc_Bomb = Explodes on destruction damaging the adjacent modules.
partdesc_Nuke = Several times more powerful than a normal bomb.
partdesc_BasicMachingun = Basic weapon with high rate of fire.
partdesc_SniperLaser = Heavy long-range laser.
partdesc_SniperLaser2 = Heavy long-range laser. Front mount version.
partdesc_Shotgun = Powerful short-range weapon. There is a danger of damaging your ship.
partdesc_AutoCannon = Improved version of the machine gun.
partdesc_CannonSmall = Fires powerful explosive projectiles, easily blocked by a shield.
partdesc_CannonBig = Bigger version of a regular cannon, easily blocked by a shield.
partdesc_PlasmagunSmall = Effective against shields, but not against ships.
partdesc_PlasmagunBig = Effective against shields, but not against ships.
partdesc_NeutGun = Does not deal direct damage, but drains the target's energy according to the "damage" stat on hit.
partdesc_DMGun = Shoots projectiles that repel objects on impact.
partdesc_NuclearRocketLauncher = Launches homing nuclear missiles. It requires hydrogen and deuterium to work.
partdesc_RocketLauncher = Launches homing missiles. Requires hydrogen to work.
partdesc_Railgun = Launches heavy projectiles at high speed, breaking through armor. Ideal against large ships.
partdesc_LaserSensor = Outputs a signal if it detects any object in front of it.
partdesc_LaserEmitter = Emits a beam of adjustable color and length.
partdesc_LaserReciever = Outputs a signal if it detects a beam that matches the settings.
partdesc_LogicAntenna = When activated, transmits logic signals on four possible frequencies. Outputs a signal if it detects a transmission on the set frequency.
partdesc_VelocitySensor = Outputs a signal if it moves faster than the set speed.
partdesc_AngVelocitySensor = Outputs a signal if it rotates faster than the set speed.
partdesc_AngleSensor = Outputs a signal if the block's rotation angle is within the specified range.
partdesc_CoordSensor = Outputs a signal if the specified block coordinate exceeds the set value.
partdesc_AltitudeSensor = Outputs a signal if the altitude relative to the surface or center of the nearest planet does not exceed the set value.
partdesc_ResourceSensor = Outputs a signal when the amount of the specified resource in the connected block exceeds the set value (in percent).
partdesc_HPSensor = Outputs a signal when the health of the connected block (or shield) exceeds the set value (in percent).
partdesc_Button = Outputs a signal if enabled.
partdesc_Screen = Becomes brighter when a signal is given.
partdesc_NotGate = Outputs a signal if there is no input signal.
partdesc_AndGate = Outputs a signal if a signal is applied to all assigned inputs.
partdesc_OrGate = Outputs a signal if a signal is applied to at least one input.
partdesc_XorGate = Outputs a signal if the signal is applied to an odd number of inputs.
partdesc_Timer = Outputs a signal for a set time after stop being signaled.
partdesc_Switch = After turning on, outputs a signal until it is turned off.
partdesc_Randomizer = Outputs a random signal when activated.
partdesc_ResourceSource = Generates any resources for free with configurable speed.
partdesc_CheatLaser = A super powerful laser that destroys everything except indestructible armor.
partdesc_CheatEngine = A super powerful engine without exhaust. The thrust can be adjusted in a wide range.
partdesc_CheatGyro = A super powerful gyro. The power can be adjusted in a wide range.
partdesc_CheatGPMP = A super powerful gravity generator. Power and radius can be adjusted in a wide range.
partdesc_CheatDecelerator = A super powerful decelerator. The power can be adjusted in a wide range.
partdesc_ImmobilityBlock = Makes the ship/segment (depending on settings) completely immobile when active.
partdesc_CheatBallast = Adjustable mass block. The mass can be adjusted in a wide range. Negative values are also allowed, but may result in strange and unpredictable behavior.
partdesc_IndestructibilityBlock = Makes blocks on the ship, segment, or connected to this one (depending on settings) invulnerable to any damage when active.
partdesc_CheatShield = A super powerful shield that is invulnerable to projectiles. The radius can be adjusted in a wide range.
partdesc_CheatBomb = Customizable bomb. Damage can be adjusted in a wide range.
partdesc_CheatStructure = Becomes completely invisible, non-collision and invulnerable after launch, preserving all connections and decorations. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
partdesc_CheatArmor = Cheat armor, invulnerable to any damage. Does not protect from area damage. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
partdesc_CheatWedge0 = Cheat armor, invulnerable to any damage. Does not protect from area damage. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
partdesc_CheatWedge1 = Cheat armor, invulnerable to any damage. Does not protect from area damage. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
partdesc_CheatWedge2 = Cheat armor, invulnerable to any damage. Does not protect from area damage. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
partdesc_CheatWedge3 = Cheat armor, invulnerable to any damage. Does not protect from area damage. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
partdesc_CheatWedge4 = Cheat armor, invulnerable to any damage. Does not protect from area damage. Can be instantly destroyed by a logic signal, which can be useful when creating maps.
